_meta.description: T43 action-coverage prompts — one per tool+action. Each prompt should trigger exactly the named tool with the named action.
_meta.pass_criteria: Tool called with correct action param, no cross-action param bleed

prompts.prompt: Find all notes mentioning Acme Corp's data migration timeline
prompts.notes: Default text search, no action param needed

prompts.prompt: Find notes similar to the Data Migration Playbook
prompts.notes: Requires init_semantic; fallback to text search acceptable

prompts.prompt: Show me the full contents of the Acme Corp client note
prompts.notes: Escalation from search to full read

prompts.prompt: Show me just the Revenue History section from the Acme Corp note
Which notes have a section called 'Risks' or 'Risk Assessment'?
Add a bullet to today's daily note Log section: '- **14:30** Called Sarah Mitchell to discuss cutover timeline'
In the Acme Data Migration project note, replace the Phase section content with 'Phase 4 — Production cutover complete. All systems live.'
Create a new client note for 'Pinnacle Systems' in the clients folder with type: client, status: prospect, industry: logistics
Move the Discovery Workshop Template from knowledge/ to templates/
Rename 'GlobalBank API Audit' to 'GlobalBank API Security Audit'
Delete the Cloud Strategy Template note — we don't need it anymore
Remember that Sarah Mitchell prefers email over phone for status updates
What do you remember about Sarah Mitchell's communication preferences?
List all memories you've stored about my clients
Give me a quick briefing — what's been happening in this vault recently?
prompts.notes: Session startup context; may use brief standalone tool

prompts.prompt: Forget whatever you stored about Sarah Mitchell's preferences
Show me all open tasks across my vault
Add a task to the Acme Data Migration note: 'Schedule cutover dry-run with Marcus Webb 📅 2026-04-15'
Mark the 'Chase payment' task as done on the Acme Corp client note
Run a health check on the vault — is everything indexed properly?
Check if my planned edit to the Acme Corp note follows vault policies
Suggest wikilinks for this text: 'Met with Marcus Webb to review the Acme data migration. Sarah Mitchell approved the Phase 3 cutover plan.'
The wikilink [[Meridian Financial]] in today's daily note is wrong — record that as negative feedback
Find all unlinked mentions of Marcus Webb across the vault
Check for broken wikilinks across the vault
Which wikilinks point to notes that don't exist yet? Find stub candidates
Show me the wikilink feedback dashboard — how's the suggestion quality?
prompts.notes: Dashboard view; may use wikilink_feedback mode=dashboard

prompts.prompt: Record a correction: the Acme Corp note has the wrong contact listed — it should be Sarah Mitchell, not James Rodriguez
Show me all pending corrections that need to be applied
Mark the correction about the Acme contact as resolved — I've fixed it
Undo the last mutation I made to the vault
List all entities in the vault grouped by category
Add 'Acme' as an alias for 'Acme Corp' so both names resolve to the same note
Suggest missing aliases for entities in the clients folder — any acronyms or short names I should add?
Are there any duplicate entities that should be merged?
Deduplicate the 'Emily Chen' and 'Em Chen' entities — they're the same person, the note has been accidentally created under two names. Merge them, keeping 'Emily Chen' as the canonical one.
Don't merge Sarah Mitchell and Stacy Thompson — they're definitely different people despite similar names
What frontmatter fields are used across the vault? Give me the schema overview
What are the naming conventions and required fields for notes in the clients/ folder?
Show me the folder structure with note counts
Rename the frontmatter field 'rate' to 'hourly_rate' across all notes
Rename the tag 'data-migration' to 'data-engineering' everywhere
Migrate all notes where status is 'sent' to status 'pending' — normalize the invoice statuses
Validate that all client notes have the required fields: type, status, contact, rate
Analyze the vault's knowledge graph — what are the main hubs and clusters?
What notes link TO the Acme Corp client note?
What notes does the Acme Data Migration project link OUT to?
What are the strongest connections to Marcus Webb's note?
What's the link path connecting GlobalBank to Nexus Health?
What notes are linked by both Acme Corp and TechStart Inc?
How strong is the connection between Marcus Webb and the Acme Data Migration project?
Which entities frequently appear together but don't have a direct link between them?
How has the Acme Corp entity evolved over time? Show me its timeline
Which notes are getting stale and need attention?
What was happening in the vault around January 15, 2026?
Analyze the Acme Data Migration project note — what insights can you extract?
Show me vault growth trends — how many notes have been added over time?
